_comment: TEMPLATE palette for cool-tone portraits (e.g. 2B from NieR:Automata) — needs pure white (dress), pure black (blindfold/hair), silver (sword blade), skin tone, and red (emblem). In 0.2.4 the white/silver/gray TODOs were FILLED with the Marble-серия (RGB sampled via VLM analysis of the 'еще элементы.jpg' screenshot — see _rgb_sources below). Black, skin and red are STILL MISSING. Until those 3 are filled, the palette LOADS (Marble entries resolve to known hashes), but it cannot yet render a recognisable 2B — the darkest entry is Sand Tussock (78,52,46) which is too warm-brown for a blindfold.
_how_to_fill: 1. In the game, place ONE of each missing decoration in your hideout.
4. The 'Unknown hashes' section lists the hash for each unknown name.
5. Add the entry to KNOWN_HASHES in src/hideout_art/constants.py.
6. Add the decoration name to ART_TYPES in the same file (if it's purely artistic).
7. Replace the TODO entries below with the actual decoration name.

_rgb_sources._method: RGB values for the Marble-серия and Cave Fossil/Coral/Brazier were measured via VLM (glm-4.6v) analysis of the screenshot исходники/еще элементы.jpg. The VLM identified each decoration visually and reported a mid-tone RGB. These are FIRST-PASS estimates, not pixel-exact medians — they may shift by ±10-15 points after a clean pixel sampling pass. The key qualitative finding: Cave Fossil is BROWN (140,110,80), not the light gray/white we assumed in 0.2.2 — it is NOT a cool-palette candidate.
_rgb_sources.Cave Fossil: (140, 110, 80) — VLM mid-tone BROWN rock; previously assumed light gray — corrected in 0.2.4. NOT a 2B cool-palette candidate.
_rgb_sources.Cave Coral: (150, 130, 110) — VLM mid-tone brownish-gray; warm, not cool. NOT a 2B candidate.
_rgb_sources.Summit Brazier: (180, 140, 80) — VLM mid-tone golden-brown metal; warm, NOT cool. Candidate for warm 'red' role only.

_colour_roles_needed_for_2b.white: 2B's dress, skin highlights, skirt trim. FILLED in 0.2.4 by Marble Fountain (230,230,220) — brightest marble, near-white. Marble Table (200,200,195) is the alternate mid-white.
_colour_roles_needed_for_2b.black: 2B's blindfold, hair, glove, boots. Look for charred wood, obsidian, ash, black sand, dark stone. STILL MISSING — Sand Tussock (78,52,46) is the closest existing option but too brown.
_colour_roles_needed_for_2b.gray: Shadows on dress, sword blade, metal details. FILLED in 0.2.4 by Marble Bench (210,210,205) and Marble Walls (210,210,205) — light cool gray.
_colour_roles_needed_for_2b.silver: Sword blade highlights, metallic accents. FILLED in 0.2.4 by Marble Table (200,200,195) — slightly cooler/darker than Marble Fountain, used for silver role. Note: 4 marble decorations have very similar RGB (200-230 range); this is intentional — they are 4 visually similar marble textures.
_colour_roles_needed_for_2b.skin: 2B's skin (visible near eyes/neck). Look for pale tan sand, pale pink sand, peach flower. Falling Sand (248,187,208) is too pink — need peach/tan. STILL MISSING.
_colour_roles_needed_for_2b.pink: Glow accents, lips. COVERED by Falling Sand.
_colour_roles_needed_for_2b.red: Emblem on dress. Look for red flower, blood moss, ruby crystal, red candle. STILL MISSING — 0.2.2 Summit Brazier (180,140,80) is golden-brown, too yellow for true red.

_available_warm_alternatives_in_0_2_1.Maraket Rubble: warm tan/khaki (138,120,94) — usable for mid-tone warm fills, NOT for cool 2B gray
_available_warm_alternatives_in_0_2_1.Maraket Treasures: dark warm gray (108,91,83) — too warm for 2B sword, but ok for warm shadow
_available_warm_alternatives_in_0_2_1.Maraket Samovar: light warm gray (148,133,115) — too warm for 2B sword, but ok for warm highlight
_available_warm_alternatives_in_0_2_1.Maraket Ornament: warm tan/khaki (136,120,97) — near-duplicate of Maraket Rubble
_available_warm_alternatives_in_0_2_1.Coastal Pebble: warm tan/khaki (134,115,94) — near-duplicate of Maraket Rubble

_0_2_4_measured_rgb_summary._comment: VLM analysis of исходники/еще элементы.jpg (2026-07-09). 4 Marble decorations + 3 cave/brazier decorations measured. Marble-серия are confirmed cool light-gray/white and now fill 3 of 6 TODOs. Cave Fossil turned out to be BROWN — corrected the prior 0.2.2 guess of 'light gray/white ammonite'.

marble_series.Marble Table: (200,200,195) — mid light gray. Role: silver (sword blade).
marble_series.Marble Walls: (210,210,205) — light gray (near-twin of Marble Bench). Role: gray alt.

not_2b_candidates.Cave Fossil: (140,110,80) BROWN — corrected from prior 'light gray/white' guess. NOT cool.

entries._role: white (2B dress, skin highlights) — FILLED 0.2.4, VLM-measured from Marble Fountain
silver (sword blade, metallic accents) — FILLED 0.2.4, VLM-measured from Marble Table
gray (shadows on dress, sword details) — FILLED 0.2.4, VLM-measured from Marble Bench
gray alt (textural variety for dithered gradients) — FILLED 0.2.4, VLM-measured from Marble Walls
black (blindfold, hair) — STILL MISSING, look in-game
